message:
feat(sandbox): Allow execveat syscall when exec is permitted

Add EXECVEAT syscall support to the Linux sandbox allow list when
exec operations are not denied:

- Add EXECVEAT constant (322 for x86_64, 281 for aarch64)
- Include EXECVEAT in allowed syscalls when !policy.deny_exec

The execveat syscall (fexecve) allows executing programs via file
descriptor instead of path, which is used by some runtimes and
is functionally equivalent to execve from a security perspective.
Without this, sandboxed programs using fexecve would be unexpectedly
killed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
